texto: Life is like a clock, it goes round and round, until the battery dies. Unlike clocks when humans die, they are either dead for good or they are still alive in the minds of others. To live on after death one must make a name for himself, if one fails to make a name for himself, then he will die alone, and forgotten.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Satuin Segi: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Life is like a clock, it goes round and round, until the battery dies. Unlike clocks when humans …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, death, memory pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e memory.

texto: War happens when people are too stubborn or scared to listen to the other party and coming up with compromises, and when that happens, they decide that we must send out people to die, if they want a war, they should not send men and woman who have no desire to fight, and have no real reason, if they want to fight the people running the show should do it themselves, they are basically murdering a lot of good people through their own cowardice.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Satuin Segi sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “War happens when people are too stubborn or scared to listen to the other party and coming up wit…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, fighting, politics, útil em momentos de luto e termino.

texto: Defeat is in the mind, if you think you have been defeated then you have lost, but if you believe they have won just one battle in the war, then you are the one who is truly ahead. Never give up, never give in, that is the way to win the war.
explicacao: Citação de Satuin Segi sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Defeat is in the mind, if you think you have been defeated then you have lost, but if you believe…” articula reflexao, fighting, vida em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como vida.

texto: Don't be afraid to live you life as a lone wolf, it is not as bad then, you will be disappointed less, your heart will be unbreakable, you will be stronger than the rest, for you know how to take pain without another, you will survive, your mental strength will be sharpened, your claws sharper, and your resistance to pain stronger.
explicacao: Citação de Satuin Segi sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Don't be afraid to live you life as a lone wolf, it is not as bad then, you will be disappointed …” articula vida, inspiracional, pain em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e vida.
